title: Craftable Heavy Core Recipe
description: Now you can get Heavy core by duplicating.
body:
# Craftable Heavy Core Recipe

**Forge the Heart of Destruction**

Why wait for rare drops or grind through endless mobs just to build your ultimate weapon? This datapack lets you craft the Heavy Core — the brutal centerpiece used to forge the mighty Mace. No luck, no limits, just raw crafting power.

Note: “Heavy Core Recipe” is a custom recipe added by the datapack.If you are interested in more Datapacks check out the links at the end of the description.

**🧠 Why It’s Better**
Because domination shouldn’t be delayed. Whether you're crushing mobs, storming dungeons, or just want to wield something that screams endgame, this pack gives you the core of chaos — on demand.

📦 How to Use:

1. Download the .zip
 
2. Drop it into your world’s datapacks/ folder
 
3. Type /reload in-game
 
4. Craft your Heavy Core and unleash the Mace
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
